case_title: JESSETTE NOVERO VS. RUDY ASERCION et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ASERCION, RUDY
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ASERCION, RUDY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOVERO, JESSETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASERCION, RUDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1390 45TH AVENUE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94122 (LOWER UNIT ), ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISE ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
